reasoning: Koren, we're focusing on your limiter: poor lactate clearance by doing over-unders to improve this during climbs like Alpine Loop. After extended rest, we'll start controlled and gradually increase intensity to maximize benefits.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Repeat 6x: 2 min at 242-256W, followed by 2 min at 201-218W to simulate over-unders

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
